data.title: Update ticket-cli-reference.md: document ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh
data.description: Update plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md to document the new ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh one-shot script under the archive/compact section. Document: (1) purpose — writes .archived markers for all existing tickets with archived net state; (2) usage — run once after deploying S1a, or any time markers fall out of sync; (3) idempotent — safe to re-run. Follow existing style and formatting conventions in the file. testing_mode: not applicable (doc-only).
